title: Mercury Strong Handheld Magnifying Glass a Light Up Magnifying Lens with an Impressive 3 x Magnification & 3 x LED Lights, Batteries are required for LED Light, White
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Enhanced Magnification | This magnifying glass offers 3 X magnification, aiding individuals with low vision in seeing more clearly
Illuminated Magnifying Glass | Featuring 3 LED lights, this magnifier provides bright illumination for clear vision even in the darkest environments
Easy to use | Simply insert 2 x AA batteries (not supplied) and press the lighting button for instant illumination
Large Viewing Lense | With larger 85mm viewing lense you will easily find and view with clarity what you wish to see
Simplify Close-Up Tasks | Ideal for observing coins, soldering, watch repair, painting nails, reading small print, jewelry making, and other crafts
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Illuminating Handheld Magnifying Glass This 3x magnifying glass is equipped with three built-in LED lights, offering extra illumination for reading, crafts, or hobbies in darker environments. With 80 lumens of brightness, it ensures easy reading and detailed work. When batteries are inserted, this handheld magnifier weighs up to 188g, providing a substantial and sturdy feel for enhanced stability. Measuring 240x115x21mm, it is compact and portable, making it convenient to carry. The magnifier operates on 2 AA batteries (not included) and comes in a sleek white colour.
